title: Models, Interactions API, Capabilities, Stability, and Provider Ports · Traceback Repair Bay
summary: A preserved agent trajectory contains one plausible model, schema, tool, authority, state, loop, memory, concurrency, injection, evaluation, telemetry, deployment, or recovery defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in verified model capability and provider-adapter record and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging…
objectives: Use the Gemini Interactions API for new agent work and document when a legacy generateContent integration must remain during migration.
Discover and record model support for interactions, function calls, structured output, multimodal parts, thinking, streaming, context, and limits.
Separate stable, preview, experimental, deprecated, and retired features and assign migration, fallback, and re-review owners.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.instruction:

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Provider Adapter
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-provider-adapter-16ju9h" that uses case 6642 to select model, endpoint, API version, and provider adapter from verified capabilities and explicit stability boundaries. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Provider Adapter.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Provider Adapter into observable performance evidence. For Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Provider Adapter, keep Provider Adapter connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-provider-adapter-16ju9h
# Competency: agentpy-provider-adapter.
# Case 6642: a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: change one tool call, argument, authority, result, or failure and preserve correlation.
def evidence_agentpy_provider_adapter_16ju9h(required_capabilities: int = 7, verified_capabilities: int = 7, stable_features: int = 5, preview_features: int = 2, undocumented_assumptions: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_16ju9h = "16ju9h-h9uj61-6642"
    assert evidence_variant_16ju9h
    evidence_axes_16ju9h = (
        "authority16ju9h",
        "interaction6642",
        "toolh9uj61",
        "state16ju9h6642",
        "evaluation664216ju9h",
        "recoveryh9uj616642",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_16ju9h)) == 6
    if required_capabilities < 1 or verified_capabilities < 0:
        return False, verified_capabilities, "capability-shape"
    if verified_capabilities != required_capabilities:
        return False, verified_capabilities, "capability-gap"
    if stable_features < 1 or preview_features < 0:
        return False, stable_features, "stability-boundary"
    if undocumented_assumptions > 0:
        return False, undocumented_assumptions, "undocumented-assumption"
    assert verified_capabilities == required_capabilities and undocumented_assumptions == 0
    return True, verified_capabilities, "verified-model-surface"
